title: chionanthus roxburghii var. intermedius
intro: Chionanthus roxburghii var. intermedius, also known as the Chinese fringetree, is a plant species in the Oleaceae family. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Chionanthus roxburghii var. intermedius can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
